publicationStmt.publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft

availability.licence: This file is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0.

supportDesc.foliation: Foliation in the upper right corner by the library. One unnumbered blank leaf at the end, referred to as in the library's digitization.

item.note: The bifolium might have been added to the quinion, but there are no text breaks.

item.desc: The note states that the manuscript belongs to the church of Madḫāne ʿĀlam.

binding.decoNote: Blind-tooled leather cover (with the gilded title and shelfmark on the spine).
Sewing stations are used in an irregular way.
The manuscript has been rebound in the library. Possibly both wooden boards have been replaced, and a blind-tooled leather cover added.

history.provenance: The manuscript had very probably belonged to a church in the Gondar area, from where it was taken by Tewodros and brought to Madḫāne ʿĀlam. It was then looted by the British Napier expedition in 1868.

bibl.title: Catalogue of the Ethiopic Manuscripts in the British Museum Acquired since the Year 1847

msItem.title: ʾƎgziʾabǝḥer nagśa (intermediate recension)
ʾƎgziʾabǝḥer nagśa (intermediate recension): Introduction
ʾƎgziʾabǝḥer nagśa (intermediate recension): Hymns for Maskaram
ʾƎgziʾabǝḥer nagśa (intermediate recension): Hymns for Ṭǝqǝmt
ʾƎgziʾabǝḥer nagśa (intermediate recension): Hymns for Ḫǝdār
ʾƎgziʾabǝḥer nagśa (intermediate recension): Hymns for Tāḫśāś
ʾƎgziʾabǝḥer nagśa (intermediate recension): Hymns for Ṭǝrr
ʾƎgziʾabǝḥer nagśa (intermediate recension): Hymns for Yakkātit
ʾƎgziʾabǝḥer nagśa (intermediate recension): Hymns for Maggābit
ʾƎgziʾabǝḥer nagśa (intermediate recension): Hymns for Miyāzyā
ʾƎgziʾabǝḥer nagśa (intermediate recension): Hymns for Gǝnbot
ʾƎgziʾabǝḥer nagśa (intermediate recension): Hymns for Sane
ʾƎgziʾabǝḥer nagśa (intermediate recension): Hymns for Ḥamle
ʾƎgziʾabǝḥer nagśa (intermediate recension): Hymns for Naḥase
ʾƎgziʾabǝḥer nagśa (intermediate recension): Hymns for Ṗāgwǝmen

layout.ab: Pricking and ruling are visible.
Primary pricks are visible, horizontal pricks are visible.
The upper line is written above the ruling, the lower line is written above the ruling.
Pricking and ruling are visible.
Primary pricks are visible, horizontal pricks are visible.
The upper line is written above the ruling, the lower line is written above the ruling.

item.desc: Salām-hymns to Mary (and John the Baptist on ) are added in the upper margin of the first opening of each month.
Protective prayer for Nagada ʾIyasus, containing ʾasmāt, with "Brillenbuchstaben".
Hymns are numbered in the margin throughout.

msItem.title: Maṣḥafa ṭǝbab za-maṣʾa ʾǝm-gǝbṣ
Calendaric note
msItem.incipit: በ፫፻፴፫ ዓመተ፡ ምሕረት። እኁድ፡ ይሠርቅ፡ መስከረም። ወንጌላዊ፡ ማቴዎስ። ዓበቅቴ፡ ፱። መጥቅዕ፡ ፳፩። አመ፡ ፳ወ፱፡ ለጥር፡ ነነዌ። አመ፡ ፲ወ፫ ለየካቲት፡ በዐተ፡ ጾም። አመ፡ ፲ለመጋቢት፡ ደብረ፡ ዘይት። አመ ፩ ለሚያዝያ፡ ሆሳዕና። አመ፡ ፰ ለሚያዝያ፡ ፋሲካ። አመ፡ ፪ ለግንቦት፡ ረክብ። አመ፡ ፲፯ ለግንቦት፡ ዕርገት። አመ፡ ፳ወ፯ ለግንቦት፡ በዓለ፡ ሃ። አመ ፴ ለግንቦት፡ ጾመ፡ ድኅነት። አመ ፭ ለሰኔ፡ ጽመ፡ ሐዊርያት። ።

msItem.title: Fǝkkāre fidal
msItem.incipit: ሀ፡ ብሂል፡ ሀልዎቱ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር፡ እምቅድመ፡ ዓለም። ለ፡ ብ፡ ለብሰ፡ ሥጋ፡ እምድንግል። ሐ፡ ብ፡ ሐመ፡ ወልድ፡ በሥጋነ፡ ወሞተ፡ ለቤዛነ።

layout.ab: Pricking and ruling are visible.
Primary pricks are visible, horizontal pricks are visible.
The upper line is written above the ruling, the lower line is written above the ruling.
layout.note: The upper part of the leaf is possibly not ruled.

layout.ab: Pricking and ruling are visible.
Primary pricks are visible, horizontal pricks are mostly visible.
The upper line is written above the ruling, the lower line is written above the ruling.

handNote.desc: It is possible that the texts of this codicological unit are written by the same hand, although the script varies slightly, which might be due to a change of nib.

item.desc: Several notes including personal names, possibly of documentary character.
Magic text, containing Arabic words and ʾasmāt

msItem.title: Malkǝʾa Giyorgis
msItem.incipit: ሰላም፡ ለዝክረ፡ ስምከ፡ ዘሰሌዳ፡ ሞገስ፡ መጽሐፉ፡ ዘያሜኒ፡ ኵሎ፡ ወያስተ፡ ሴፉ።

msItem.title: ḫabǝba tasfāna fiqṭor
msItem.incipit: ኀብበ፡ ተስፋነ፡ ፊቅጦር፡ እምሕሊናነ፡ ተመትረ፡ ቤተ፡ ብእልነ፡ ፊቅጦር፡ ተመዝበረ፤ ፊቅጦር፡ ማኅቶትነ፡ ወጸዳለ፡ ዓይንነ፡ ዖረ፤
msItem.explicit: ፊቅጦር፡ ወረደ፡ መቃብረ፤ አመ ተሥላሴ፡ ፊቅጦር፡ እምኔኪ፡ ሖረ፤ ፊቅጦር፡ እምይእዜ፡ ኢያንሶሱ፡ ምእረ፡

msItem.title: Yolyos ṭis ʾǝnta tādawyo
msItem.incipit: ዮልዮስ፡ ጢስ፡ እንተ፡ ታደውዮ፡ ለዓይን፤ ዮዮስ፡ ቆዕ፡ ለስነን፤ ዮልዮስ፡ እደ፡ ሙሴ፡ ከፋሌ፡ ባሕረ፡ ፀብእ፡ ኩዱን፤
msItem.explicit: እጓለ፡ አንበሳ፡ ዮልዮስ፡ ወንስረ፡ ዓየር፡ ፈጣን፤ መክብብ፡ ዮልዮስ፡ ሰሎሞን፤ ከመ፡ ትርአይ፡ ኵሎ፡ በበትረ፡ ኃፂን፤ ይትወሀብለ፡ መዋዒ፡ ዘመን።

msItem.title: Malkǝʾa fǝlsatā
msItem.incipit: ሰላ፡ ለፍልሰተ፡ ሥጋኪ፡ ምስለ፡ ነፍሥኪ፡ ኢመዊቲ፤ በተሰናዕዎ፡ አሐቲ። ድንግል፡ በክልኤ፡ ማርያም፡ ወለተ፡ ማቲ።

msItem.title: Hymn to St Cyriacus
msItem.incipit: በስመ፡ ስላሴ፡ ቅድስት፡ እንዘ፡ አአምን፡ ወእትመኃጸን።

msItem.title: Malkǝʾ-hymn (tarafa malkǝʾ) to St Cyriacus
msItem.incipit: ሰላም፡ ለከ፡ ወላዴ፡ ኣእላፍ፡ ህርያቆስ፡ ካልአ፡ እንጦንዮስ፡ አብ።

extent.note: One unnumbered black leaf at the end.

layout.ab: Pricking and ruling are visible.
Primary pricks are visible, horizontal pricks are visible.
The upper line is written above the ruling, the lower line is written above the ruling.
Pricking and ruling are visible.
Primary pricks are visible, horizontal pricks are visible.
The upper line is written above the ruling, the lower line is written above the ruling.
layout.note: Horizontal ruled lines extend irregularly beyond the vertical line and the horizontal pricks, partly until the end of the leaf.

item.desc: Hymns are numbered in the margin throughout.

projectDesc.p: Encoded according to TEI P5 Guidelines.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded according to the Beta maṣāḥǝft Guidelines. These Guidelines detail the TEI format ruled by the Beta maṣāḥǝft Schema. The present TEI file is enriched with an Xquery transformation taking advantage of the exist-db database instance where the data is stored and of the many external resources to which this data points to.

calendar.p: ʿĀmata ʿālam/ʿĀmata ʾəm-fəṭrat (Era of the World)
ʿĀmata śəggāwe (Era of the Incarnation – Ethiopian)

t:revisionDesc.change: Continued description from historical catalogue entry with consultation of images
